subject: Question about your refund policy
body: Hi, I recently cancelled my subscription and I want to understand if I qualify for a prorated refund. What is your policy for mid-cycle cancellations? I signed up on the 15th and cancelled on the 22nd.

subject: I was charged twice this month
body: I noticed two charges of $29.99 on my credit card statement this month, both from your service. I only have one account. Please investigate and refund the duplicate charge. My last payment was on June 1st and there is another on June 3rd.

subject: Cannot log in to my account
body: I keep getting an error when I try to log in. I have tried resetting my password twice but the reset email never arrives. I can see my account exists because I get a different error when I try to sign up with the same email. Please help me regain access.

subject: Export button not working on Safari
body: The export to CSV button on the reports page does nothing when I click it. I am using Safari 17 on macOS Sonoma. I have tried clearing my cache. The button works fine on Chrome. Steps to reproduce: go to Reports, filter by last 30 days, click Export CSV. The button appears to flash briefly but nothing downloads. Error code: none visible.

subject: Payment failed and now I can't log in
body: My credit card expired and my payment failed last week. I updated my card details but my account still shows as suspended and I cannot log in. The new card is valid and has funds. Please fix my billing and restore my access.

subject: Unexpected charge and suspicious activity
body: I was charged $299 for an enterprise plan upgrade I never authorised. I only have a Pro plan. Please refund this charge immediately. I am also concerned someone may have accessed my account without my knowledge.

subject: Dashboard just spins and never loads
body: My dashboard has been completely broken for two days. When I sign in it just shows a spinning loader indefinitely. I have tried on three different browsers and two different computers. Nothing loads at all. I have no idea what the issue could be.

subject: App completely down - cannot access anything
body: Your entire platform appears to be down. None of our team members can access anything. The login page itself is returning a 503 error. This is affecting our whole company. We need an urgent response. Multiple users affected across different locations.

subject: I need help
body: Hi, I am having some kind of problem with my account. Something is not right but I am not sure how to explain it. Things seem off. Please look into it.
